name: pyshelf
tagline: A lightweight self-hosted ebook and publication library manager
description: pyShelf is a lightweight self-hosted media management tool designed for organizing ebooks and publications. It allows browsing and downloading through a simple web UI.

features.title: Personal Library
features.description: Catalog and manage personal book collections

features.title: Metadata Management
features.description: Store details about books and authors

features.title: Search and Filtering
features.description: Find books using search and filters

features.title: Web Interface
features.description: Manage the library through a browser

features.title: Self-Hosted Deployment
features.description: Run the library system on your own servers
